title: NotSimple Peniwise
description: Abandoned Amusement Park is a horror Forge mod that adds an abandoned park theme with animated attractions, custom blocks and items, and three Pennywise encounters with configurable abilities, events, and rewards.
body:
# Abandoned Amusement Park

`Abandoned Amusement Park` is a Forge mod built around a creepy abandoned park theme, animated attractions, and three separate Pennywise encounters. It uses GeckoLib for animated entities, blocks, and items, and fits horror maps or themed modpacks.

## What the mod adds

- `Pennywise Stage 1` — the first Pennywise form. It can summon a ghost bike that charges the player.
- `Pennywise Stage 2` — grabs the player and drags them toward a darkness point defined in the config.
- `Pennywise Stage 3` — uses multiple abilities: partial invisibility, phasing through blocks, and teleporting players around the park.
- Shooting range targets — targets spawn in configurable park zones and can be destroyed with thrown stones.
- Dynamometer mini-game — strong hits reward the player.
- Slot machine — consumes tickets, pays out ore rewards, and locks itself after a jackpot.
- Trash bins — large and small bins with random loot that refills over time.

## Features

- Separate spawn eggs for all three Pennywise stages.
- Animated models for mobs, blocks, and items.
- Configurable park dimension, darkness zone, teleport zone, and target spawn areas.
- Commands for manual ability activation and config reloads.
- Built-in localization for `Russian`, `English`, `Spanish`, `Portuguese`, `French`, and `German`.

## Commands

```text
/aap reload
/aap stand activate
/aap pennywise_1 activate bike
/aap pennywise_1 screamer
/aap pennywise_1 reset
/aap pennywise_2 activate grab
/aap pennywise_2 screamer
/aap pennywise_2 reset
/aap pennywise_3 activate invisibility|invis|phase|phasing|teleport
/aap pennywise_3 reset
```

## Supported Minecraft versions

- `1.16.5`
- `1.19.4`
- `1.20.1`
- `1.20.4`
- `1.21`
- `1.21.1`
- `1.21.4`
- `1.21.6`
- `1.21.8`
- `1.21.11`

## Dependencies

- `Minecraft Forge`
- `GeckoLib`

If you are building a horror map or a haunted amusement-park experience, this mod gives you animated threats, interactive attractions, and configurable park events out of the box.
